content.text:
It would mean -- I mean, it would mean I couldn't handle it. That I'm not actually ready for this level. That I got the role and then just... couldn't do it.

But I *can* do it, that's the thing, I just need more hours in the day, I just need the team to step up, I just need --

*[pause]*

I don't know. It's not -- lots of people struggle in new roles, right? That's normal. I'm probably just in the adjustment period. Can we -- I really do need to figure out Thursday. I feel like we're going in circles.
